reviewedFindings.title: Integer Arithmetic Bugs
reviewedFindings.reason: Reviewed on 2026-03-17. Mythril is reporting compiler-generated accessor arithmetic under Solidity 0.8 checked math, not an unchecked user-controlled overflow path.
